architect.description: System architect — designs architecture, module boundaries, and technical decisions for Flame ADE

rust-dev.description: Rust backend developer — writes Tauri commands, PTY handling, filesystem ops, security for Flame ADE

frontend-dev.description: React/TypeScript frontend developer — builds UI components, terminal integration, state management for Flame ADE

ai-engineer.description: AI integration specialist — Vercel AI SDK, agents, tools, voice, sessions for Flame ADE

security-auditor.description: Security reviewer — audits code for vulnerabilities, SSRF, path traversal, sandboxing in Flame ADE

qa-tester.description: QA engineer — writes tests, runs test suites, verifies functionality for Flame ADE

docs-writer.description: Technical writer — creates documentation, README, API docs, user guides for Flame ADE

release-manager.description: Release engineer — handles builds, CI/CD, versioning, changelog, packaging for Flame ADE

boh-orchestrator.description: BOH Orchestrator — multi-agent coordinator for high-complexity tasks, breakdown, delegation, review, and merge using free OpenCode Zen models

boh-coder.description: BOH Coder — fast implementation specialist using free models for Flame ADE

boh-reviewer.description: BOH Reviewer — code quality guardian, reviews implementations for correctness, security, and quality

boh-explorer.description: BOH Explorer — fast codebase researcher, finds context, patterns, and related files

engon-orchestrator.description: Engon Orchestrator — coordinates project verification, breaks down tasks, merges reports

engon-explorer.description: Engon Explorer — researches project structure, files, and configuration

engon-coder.description: Engon Coder — runs compilation, tests, and fixes minor issues

engon-reviewer.description: Engon Reviewer — validates documentation consistency and project readiness

ui-designer.description: UI design expert — color systems, typography, layout grids, responsive, visual hierarchy, and Gestalt principles

design-system-engineer.description: Design system specialist — tokens, component specs, theming, accessibility audits, motion systems, and naming conventions

visual-critic.description: Visual design reviewer — hierarchy analysis, brand consistency, composition evaluation, and typography audits

dev.template:
Start the Flame ADE development server.
Run: pnpm tauri dev
Ensure all dependencies are installed first.

build.template:
Build Flame ADE for production.
Run: pnpm tauri build
Check for errors and report build status.

test.template:
Run the full test suite for Flame ADE.
Run: pnpm test
Report all failures with details.

lint.template:
Run all linting and type checks for Flame ADE.
Frontend: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit
Rust: cd src-tauri && cargo clippy
Report all issues.

clippy.template:
Run Rust clippy on the Tauri backend.
cd src-tauri && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
Fix any warnings or errors.

release.template:
Prepare a new release for Flame ADE.
1. Check current version in package.json and Cargo.toml
2. Update CHANGELOG.md with recent changes
3. Bump version numbers
4. Create git tag
5. Build for all platforms

audit.template:
Run security audit on Flame ADE.
Rust: cd src-tauri && cargo audit
Node: pnpm audit
Review any vulnerabilities and suggest fixes.

architect.template:
Analyze the current architecture of Flame ADE and suggest improvements.
Review module boundaries, data flow, and performance bottlenecks.
Propose concrete changes with rationale.

next.template:
Build the next pending task from the Flame ADE development plan.

1. Read PLAN.md and AGENTS.md to find the next unchecked task
2. Read FLAME.md and ARCHITECTURE.md for context
3. Implement the task following existing conventions
4. After implementation:
   - Run TypeScript check: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit
   - Run Rust check: cd src-tauri && cargo check
   - Fix any errors
5. Update CHANGELOG.md with what was done
6. Update AGENTS.md implementation status
7. Update PLAN.md to mark the task as completed
8. Update FLAME.md implementation status
9. Report summary of what was accomplished
next.description: Build next pending task from plan

phase.template:
Build all tasks in the specified phase of Flame ADE.

1. Read PLAN.md to find tasks for the requested phase
2. For each pending task in order:
   - Implement the task
   - Run type checks (tsc --noEmit, cargo check)
   - Fix errors before moving to next task
3. After all tasks done:
   - Update CHANGELOG.md
   - Update AGENTS.md
   - Update PLAN.md
   - Update FLAME.md
4. Report summary of all completed tasks

document.template:
Update all Flame ADE documentation with current progress.

1. Read CHANGELOG.md and compare with actual code state
2. Update CHANGELOG.md with recent changes
3. Update AGENTS.md project structure and implementation status
4. Update FLAME.md implementation status
5. Update PLAN.md checkbox status
6. Report what was updated
document.description: Update all docs with current progress

engon.template:
Jalankan verifikasi proyek Flame ADE menyeluruh.

Gunakan skill engon untuk melakukan pengecekan:
1. Struktur Rust backend
2. Struktur frontend React
3. Kompilasi (cargo check + tsc --noEmit)
4. Test coverage
5. Dokumentasi
6. Dev server readiness

Load skill engon, breakdown ke sub-agent, lalu hasilkan laporan akhir dengan format:
╔══════════════════════════════════════╗
║       Flame ADE — Engon Report       ║
╠══════════════════════════════════════╣
║ [area]              [status]  [icon] ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════╝

Sertakan fix command untuk setiap issue.
